rulebook.actual_reform_definition: Actual reform requires a legal or policy instrument, an explicit adopted measure, a parameter change, or an implementation update tied to a named reform, law, resolution, strategy, program, project, master plan, roadmap, or adopted package.

include_rules.label: Legal or regulatory change
include_rules.description: Include legal or policy instruments only when the text identifies an adopted or amended law, decree, resolution, regulation, order, code, legal act, or rule package.

include_rules.label: Adopted policy measure
include_rules.description: Include explicit adopted measures, approvals, launches, introduced packages, expanded incentives, or entered-into-force changes.

include_rules.label: Monetary or financial-sector parameter
include_rules.description: Include monetary or financial-sector parameter changes, not previews, analytical material, or future policy-rate meetings.

include_rules.label: Fiscal, tax, budget, subsidy, or tariff measure
include_rules.description: Include explicit fiscal, tax, budget, subsidy, duty, tariff, incentive, compensation, or fiscal-monitoring measures with an adopted or parameterized change.

include_rules.label: Trade or customs modernization
include_rules.description: Include adopted trade, customs, border, declaration, WTO, or market-access measures, not general trade or customs news.

include_rules.label: Structural implementation program
include_rules.description: Include implementation updates tied to a named reform, law, resolution, strategy, master plan, roadmap, program, project, or adopted package.

include_rules.label: Binding international financing or agreement
include_rules.description: Include signed grants, loans, and donor financing only when tied to a named adopted reform, program, master plan, or roadmap with implementation measures.

exclude_rules.label: Routine meeting without policy measure
exclude_rules.description: Exclude meetings, talks, roundtables, visits, and side-event diplomacy unless the text states a legal, budgetary, regulatory, or implementation measure.

exclude_rules.label: Cooperation news without instrument
exclude_rules.description: Exclude generic cooperation, partnership, or prospect-expansion announcements without a signed instrument, financing amount, or concrete policy action.

exclude_rules.label: Training or outreach
exclude_rules.description: Exclude trainings, calendars, awareness weeks, seminars, workshops, and public outreach even when they refer to an existing reform or resolution.

exclude_rules.label: Analytical report only
exclude_rules.description: Exclude analytical reports, indicator reviews, monitoring notes, and statistics releases without an adopted measure or implementation update.

exclude_rules.label: Ceremonial or cultural event
exclude_rules.description: Exclude commemorative, cultural, spiritual, award, and protocol events.

exclude_rules.label: Security or defense measure outside economic-policy scope
exclude_rules.description: Exclude military, defense, and security-sector modernization unless separately represented as a fiscal, industrial, trade, or public-service economic measure.

exclude_rules.label: Administrative update only
exclude_rules.description: Exclude internal performance-discipline, reporting, staffing, and ministry process updates without a policy measure.

exclude_rules.label: Generic announcement without action
exclude_rules.description: Exclude previews, future discussions, draft consultations, generic announcements, and published materials without an adopted measure or parameterized instrument.

relevance_scoring.hard_gate: Domain relevance alone is insufficient. A candidate must match at least one include rule and at least one hard reform signal: instrument, adopted measure, parameter change, named implementation update, or binding financing program.
relevance_scoring.high_relevance: 70-100: explicit adopted legal, regulatory, budget, monetary, trade, binding financing program, or implementation measure.
relevance_scoring.medium_relevance: 50-69: hard reform candidate with a single adopted instrument, measure, parameter, implementation, or binding financing program signal.
relevance_scoring.low_relevance: 0-49: generic news, routine activity, reports, training, cooperation, consultations, or insufficient hard reform evidence.

exclusion_reasons.description: The text does not identify a legal, regulatory, fiscal, monetary, trade, implementation, or financing measure.
The item is routine meeting or diplomatic engagement coverage without an explicit policy measure.
The item announces cooperation or prospects but no signed instrument, financing commitment, or policy change.
The item is training, awareness, outreach, or event logistics only.
The item is an analytical report, indicator review, monitoring note, or statistics release without an adopted reform measure.
The item is ceremonial, cultural, commemorative, or protocol content.
The item is military, defense, or security-sector modernization outside the economic-policy tracker scope.
The item is internal administrative reporting without a policy measure.
The item previews future activity, consultation, or generic priorities without an adopted measure, instrument, parameter change, or named implementation update.
The text matched weak signals but not enough evidence for intake.
The item did not expose a stable item-level source link.

reform_packages.title: Financial-sector AML/CFT internal control rules reform
reform_packages.policy_area: AML/CFT controls for banks, nonbank lenders, payments, and e-money institutions
reform_packages.next_milestone: No future milestone published in verified source
responsible_institutions: National Database of Legislation of the Republic of Uzbekistan (Lex.uz)
reform_packages.legal_basis: Verified official source events: 2886-12 08.05.2026 Tijorat banklarida jinoiy faoliyatdan olingan daromadlarni legallashtirishga, terrorizmni moliyalashtirishga va ommaviy qirgʻin qurolini tarqatishni moliyalashtirishga qarshi kurashish boʻyicha ichki nazorat qoidalariga qoʻshimcha va oʻzgartirishlar kiritish haqida; 2925-10 08.05.2026 Nobank kredit tashkilotlarida jinoiy faoliyatdan olingan daromadlarni legallashtirishga, terrorizmni moliyalashtirishga va ommaviy qirgʻin qurolini tarqatishni moliyalashtirishga qarshi kurashish boʻyicha ichki nazorat qoidalariga qoʻshimcha va oʻzgartirishlar kiritish haqida; 3266-5 08.05.2026 Toʻlov tizimlari operatorlari, elektron pullar tizimlari operatorlari va toʻlov tashkilotlarida jinoiy faoliyatdan olingan daromadlarni legallashtirishga, terrorizmni moliyalashtirishga va ommaviy qirgʻin qurolini tarqatishni moliyalashtirishga qarshi kurashish boʻyicha ichki nazorat qoidalariga oʻzgartirish va qoʻshimchalar kiritish haqida.
reform_packages.official_basis: National Database of Legislation of the Republic of Uzbekistan (Lex.uz)
reform_packages.short_summary: Consolidates related legal updates to AML/CFT internal-control rules across banks, nonbank credit organizations, payment-system operators, e-money operators, and payment organizations. The package is kept as one financial-sector compliance dossier because the source events update parallel control-rule frameworks on the same date.
parameters_or_amounts: Commercial bank AML/CFT internal-control rules amended
Nonbank credit organization AML/CFT internal-control rules amended
Payment-system, e-money, and payment-organization AML/CFT internal-control rules amended
Verified official source event date: 2026-05-08
reform_packages.why_tracked: The source events amend binding internal-control rules for financial institutions and payment providers. They are grouped to avoid presenting parallel AML/CFT legal updates as separate reforms.

reform_packages.next_milestone: No future milestone published in verified source
responsible_institutions: Official website of the President of the Republic of Uzbekistan
National Database of Legislation of the Republic of Uzbekistan (Lex.uz)
reform_packages.legal_basis: Verified official source events: Measures discussed to reduce bureaucracy and strengthen construction oversight; 3356-1 07.05.2026 “Oʻzbekiston Respublikasi Qurilish vazirligi huzuridagi qurilish sohasida hududiy nazorat inspeksiyalari tomonidan oʻtkaziladigan bino va inshootlarning instrumental texnik tekshiruv ishlarini baholashning yagona hisoblash tartibi toʻgʻrisidagi nizomni tasdiqlash haqida”gi buyruqni oʻz kuchini yoʻqotgan deb topish toʻgʻrisida; 3828 07.05.2026 Oʻzbekiston Respublikasi Vazirlar Mahkamasi huzuridagi Qurilish va uy-joy kommunal xoʻjaligi sohasida nazorat qilish inspeksiyasining hududiy nazorat qilish inspeksiyalari tomonidan oʻtkaziladigan bino va inshootlarning texnik holatini oʻrganish va sinov-laboratoriya ishlari narxlarini hisoblash tartibi toʻgʻrisidagi nizomni tasdiqlash haqida.
reform_packages.official_basis: Official website of the President of the Republic of Uzbekistan; National Database of Legislation of the Republic of Uzbekistan (Lex.uz)
reform_packages.short_summary: Groups verified construction-oversight measures covering reduced bureaucracy, stronger supervision, and technical inspection or laboratory-work pricing rules. The package separates this oversight dossier from the broader housing and urbanization package.
parameters_or_amounts: Construction oversight and bureaucracy-reduction measures recorded
Technical condition and laboratory-work price calculation regulation approved
Prior instrumental technical inspection pricing order superseded where cited by source event
Verified official source event dates: 2026-05-06, 2026-05-07
reform_packages.why_tracked: The official sources identify related construction oversight and inspection-pricing measures. Grouping them prevents a repealed pricing order, a new pricing regulation, and presidential oversight instructions from appearing as unrelated dossiers.

official_source_events.title: Measures discussed to reduce bureaucracy and strengthen construction oversight
official_source_events.source_institution: Official website of the President of the Republic of Uzbekistan
official_source_events.summary: Official web-site of the President of Uzbekistan Official pages in social networks President of the Republic of Uzbekistan Measures discussed to reduce bureaucracy and strengthen construction oversight President Shavkat Mirziyoyev reviewed a presentation on reducing bureaucracy and increasing the efficiency of oversight in the construction, housing, and communal services sectors. The large-scale work being carried out in the construction sector contributes to the development of modern housing, social facilities, and convenient infrastructure. At the same time, the facilities under construction must be safe, high-quality, and fully compliant with environmental and urban planning requirements.

official_source_events.title: 3356-1 07.05.2026 “Oʻzbekiston Respublikasi Qurilish vazirligi huzuridagi qurilish sohasida hududiy nazorat inspeksiyalari tomonidan oʻtkaziladigan bino va inshootlarning instrumental texnik tekshiruv ishlarini baholashning yagona hisoblash tartibi toʻgʻrisidagi nizomni tasdiqlash haqida”gi buyruqni oʻz kuchini yoʻqotgan deb topish toʻgʻrisida

official_source_events.summary: Oʻzbekiston Respublikasi qurilish va uy-joy kommunal xoʻjaligi vazirining buyrugʻi, 06.05.2026 yilda ro‘yxatdan o‘tgan, ro‘yxat raqami 3356-1 Qo‘shimcha axborot Asosiy rekvizitlar Qayta ko‘rib chiqish tarixi Ulashish Telegram Facebook Twitter Instagram

official_source_events.title: 3828 07.05.2026 Oʻzbekiston Respublikasi Vazirlar Mahkamasi huzuridagi Qurilish va uy-joy kommunal xoʻjaligi sohasida nazorat qilish inspeksiyasining hududiy nazorat qilish inspeksiyalari tomonidan oʻtkaziladigan bino va inshootlarning texnik holatini oʻrganish va sinov-laboratoriya ishlari narxlarini hisoblash tartibi toʻgʻrisidagi nizomni tasdiqlash haqida
